name: PER_ADDRESSES_F
description: This table holds addresses for a person or for a location.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of the primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
columns.Comments: First line of address

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_2
columns.Comments: Second line of address

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_3
columns.Comments: Third line of address

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_4
columns.Comments: Fourth line of address

columns.Name: BUILDING
columns.Comments: Building name of the address

columns.Name: FLOOR_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Floor Number of the address

columns.Name: TOWN_OR_CITY
columns.Comments: Name of the Town or City for the address

columns.Name: REGION_1
columns.Comments: Primary region in which the address is located.

columns.Name: REGION_2
columns.Comments: Sub-region of Region 1.

columns.Name: REGION_3
columns.Comments: Sub-region of Region 2.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country of the address

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: Postal code of the address

columns.Name: LONG_POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: Long postal codes are used in some countries in addition to more well-known short postal codes.

columns.Name: TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the standard timezone boundary under which the address falls.

columns.Name: DERIVED_LOCALE
columns.Comments: Displays the area where the address is, for example City, Country or City, State, Country. The exact format varies with country, and the contents are populated from the other fields on the address

columns.Name: GEOMETRY
columns.Comments: Specifies coordinates of the location defined by the address. Special data type required to store.

columns.Name: LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: Distance between the prime meridian and an address located to its east or west, expressed in degrees and minutes.

columns.Name: LATITUDE
columns.Comments: Distance between the equator and an address located to its north or south, expressed in degrees and minutes.

columns.Name: VALIDATION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Level of accuracy of an address as determined by an address provider.

columns.Name: PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Company that has validated an address.

columns.Name: DQ_VALIDATION_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Level of validation of the address, showing confidence in address quality

columns.Name: ADDL_ADDRESS_ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Additional Address Columns for localization development.

columns.Name: ADDL_ADDRESS_ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Additional Address Columns for localization development.

columns.Name: ADDL_ADDRESS_ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Additional Address Columns for localization development.

columns.Name: ADDL_ADDRESS_ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Additional Address Columns for localization development.

columns.Name: ADDL_ADDRESS_ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Additional Address Columns for localization development.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: RECORD_CREATOR
columns.Comments: Module Identifier for address population.
